emails.body: Re: Keneally's sure. do you and Shanna want to go to the Prince concert? Tickets go on sale tomorrow. Brian T. Hoskins Enron Broadband Services 713-853-0380 (office) 713-412-3667 (mobile) 713-646-5745 (fax) Brian_Hoskins@enron.net Eric Bass@ECT 11/17/00 08:30 AM
